recommendation: use symmetry-mismatch benchmarks for VIM, preserve raw Xi'/Xi benchmark as a negative control

variants.name: riemann_sweep
variants.interpretation: Negative control: raw singular ratio remains edge-biased and is dominated by zero-line spikes.

variants.name: riemann_principal_value
variants.interpretation: Reduces or caps pole influence, but still tracks the edge in this implementation.

variants.name: riemann_regularized_log
variants.interpretation: Reduces or caps pole influence, but still tracks the edge in this implementation.

variants.name: riemann_zero_attraction
variants.interpretation: Passes by construction for critical-line attraction, but it is a different objective from symmetry-minimality.

variants.name: riemann_logxi_symmetry_mismatch
variants.interpretation: Best match for a symmetry-minimality test without rewarding singularity avoidance.

variants.name: riemann_zero_density_symmetry_mismatch
variants.interpretation: Best match for a symmetry-minimality test without rewarding singularity avoidance.

variants.name: riemann_receiver_width_cost
variants.interpretation: Best match for a symmetry-minimality test without rewarding singularity avoidance.
